name: GovernanceIndex
description: Live AI governance TRiSM and compliance risk scoring. Regulatory risk scores, audit readiness, and framework mapping across EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and OWASP LLM Top 10, updated daily.
rai:dataCollection: Regulatory data sourced from EU AI Act official texts, NIST AI RMF publications, ISO 42001 standards, and OWASP LLM Top 10. All public regulatory sources.
rai:dataBiases: Coverage weighted toward major international frameworks. Regional or sector-specific regulations may be underrepresented. Risk scores are interpretive assessments.
rai:dataLimitations: Regulatory interpretations may differ across jurisdictions
Risk scores are algorithmic assessments not legal advice
Framework coverage focused on major international standards
Compliance mappings are approximations and may not capture all nuances

distribution.name: GovernanceIndex Latest CSV
distribution.description: Full governance dataset in CSV format, updated daily

distribution.name: GovernanceIndex Latest JSON
distribution.description: Full governance dataset in JSON format, updated daily

distribution.name: Documentation
distribution.description: Primary dataset documentation with schema, methodology, and usage instructions
